programme.title: Golf: Countdown to the Ryder Cup
programme.desc: Episode Three revisits the fiery 1990s, from Kiawah '91 to Brookline '99.

programme.desc: Episode Four revisits the Miracle at Medinah, one of Europe's greatest comebacks.
